block-definition.s: SDL get next signal input queue entry

block.l: z100 SDL real time clock synchronized
z100 SDL real time clock synchronized

block-definition.s: get ordered SDL signal input queue log

block.var: z100 SDL signal input queue log

block-definition.comment: Reports a sorted version of the list in its first input slot, using the comparison function in the second input slot. For a list of numbers, using < as the comparison function will sort from low to high; using > will sort from high to low.
block-definition.translations: ca:ordena _ segons criteri _ pl:$flash sortuj _ za pomocą _

block.l: z100 SDL signal input queue log
z100 SDL empty signal input queue counter

custom-block.s: SDL get next signal input queue entry

block.l: z100 SDL empty signal input queue counter

block-definition.s: SDL send signal %'signal' to %'agent' delay %'delay' param %'param'

block.var: z100 SDL signal input queue log

block-definition.comment: This block creates new variables on the selected scope: global (for all sprites), sprite (for this sprite only) or script (only for that blocks stack) with the names given (in 'names' list). If there is already a variable with that name in that scope, it does nothing: no errors and no overwrites.
block-definition.translations: pt:cria as variáveis _ _ ca:crea les _ variables _ es:crear las _ variables _ de:erstellen _ var _

block.var: z100 SDL real time clock synchronized

variable.name: z100 SDL empty signal input queue counter
z100 SDL real time clock synchronized
z100 SDL signal input queue log
z100 SDL deleted log
